repo_prior_art.cite: eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator: finite LP envelope; pid_mediation_proxy: affine marginal proxy-null intervals

published_prior_art.cite: GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023ProxyPI: proxy-based causal-effect bounds without completeness; BalkePearl1997: sharp finite LP treatment-effect bounds

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy: failed sharp proxy-null mediation set identified the realization obstruction but did not solve it

published_prior_art.cite: MiaoGengTchetgen2018Biometrika: point identification under rank/completeness, not rank-deficient finite response-type realization

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_spectral_phase_transition: row-space phase analogy only, not proximal bridge ATE identified sets

published_prior_art.cite: ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023SPL/BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT/Santos2011JoE: functional identification despite nuisance nonuniqueness is already prior art

structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: Balke--Pearl is named as a load-bearing finite LP/sharpness analogy in the body but has no stable bibliography entry or bibkey.

novelty_flags.label: proposal
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the survey must include BalkePearl1997 and Manski-style sharp-bounds prior art and explain why the proximal realization theorem is more than a routine finite LP restatement.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The §8(b) phrase 'applied PCI diagnostic recommended by TchetgenYingCuiShiMiao2024StatSci' overstates that overview: it introduces proximal causal inference, but does not recommend this null-loading/LP phase diagnostic.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The residual-tolerance clause is not well-posed: 'first-order inflation' is undefined, no perturbed endpoint/width functional is named, and the bound divides by sigma_+(P) even when it is defined as 0.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Balke-Pearl and Manski sharp-bounds references to §5/§13, then state explicitly whether Conjecture 1 is a proximal analogue of finite response-type LP sharpness or a genuinely new obstruction/remedy.
Replace the residual-tolerance sentence in Conjecture 2 with a precise definition of Delta_epsilon(P), the normed perturbation model, and the finite/infinite convention when sigma_+(P)=0.

To reach flagship tier, strengthen Conjecture 1 from 'rational finite P' plausibility to a constructive generic-class theorem with an explicit support-size bound and nontrivial examples where Ghassami-style bounds are conservative but the bridge-fiber LP is sharp.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature/bibliography and formalize the residual-tolerance clause; then decide whether the strengthened realization theorem can plausibly lift the proposal from field to flagship.
